theme_and_archetype.description: Authority, clarity, truth. A function-first enterprise design optimized for data density and operational clarity. It utilizes strong structural grids, minimal decoration, and high-contrast typography.

rules: No Inter or generic default sans for headings.
Data tables must use text-sm for density.
Use mono font for Document Numbers (e.g., POL-001, PROC-001) for alignment and technical feel.

layout_and_spacing.header: Sticky top header, border-b border-border, backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders: border-collapse style layout or 1px borders (border-border), no soft shadows. Sharp edges or rounded-md maximum (6px).
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tight padding for data tables (p-2 to p-4), generous for empty states (p-12).
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: p-6 md:p-8 for main content area.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-md). Primary is solid inverted (black on light, white on dark). No heavy drop shadows.
components.tables: Dense, text-sm. Hover state on rows: hover:bg-zinc-100 dark:hover:bg-zinc-800/50. Actions right-aligned.
components.badges: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border. Use status_colors.
components.cards: border border-border bg-card, rounded-md, no shadow. Header has border-b.
components.inputs: Shadcn default but remove focus-visible ring if too soft, replace with solid 1px border change.
components.modals: Backdrop blur bg-black/60. Sharp modal container.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle background color shifts. No scaling (no hover:-translate-y-1) for enterprise density.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use Skeleton components from Shadcn. Keep it blocky.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the defined fonts: Cabinet Grotesk for Headings and IBM Plex Sans for Body. Add these from Google Fonts or local.
Enforce Dark/Light mode toggle in the header.
Document IDs (e.g. POL-001) MUST use JetBrains Mono or a monospace font for readability.
Avoid excessive use of cards. Use full-width tables where appropriate for data density.
Do not use transparent overlays that make text unreadable. Maintain at least 4.5:1 contrast.
For the login page split screen, use login_graphic_light in light mode and login_graphic_dark in dark mode for the hero image half.
